name: Pork Stew with Prunes and Apricots
recipeInstructions:
1. In a plastic bag, combine the flour, 1/4 tsp of salt, paprika, garlic powder, and 1/8 tsp of pepper. Add a few pieces of meat and shake to coat in the flour. Repeat with the remaining meat; set aside.
2. Heat oil over medium-high heat in a heavy saucepan. Add meat several pieces at a time and brown. Remove and set aside.
3. Reduce heat to medium-low and stir in celery, carrots, onion, parsley, cumin, and allspice. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in brandy and cook for 2 minutes. Add broth, pork, remaining 1/4 tsp of salt, and 1/8 tsp of pepper. Bring to a boil.
5. Cover and simmer on medium-low heat for 45 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add prunes and dried apricots; continue cooking for 10 minutes or until fruits are tender.
6. Serve over noodles.
